name: Komorex
description: Corpus ingenuity leveraging Tau-tech to create a high-capacity bi-modal sniper weapon of terrifying capability. Zoom in to reduce recoil and add punch through. Zoom again to fire a bursting viral round, but with a lower rate of fire. Komorex features built-in ammo conversion.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Corpus ingenuity leveraging Tau-tech to create a high-capacity bi-modal sniper weapon of terrifying capability. Zoom in to reduce recoil and add punch through. Zoom again to fire a bursting viral round, but with a lower rate of fire. Komorex features built-in ammo conversion.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Hexenon
components.description:
A reagent commonly used to produce highly combustible fuel.

Location: Jupiter

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.changes: Updated the muzzle flash position on the Komorex.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sniper Rifles with multishot projectiles (Lanka, Komorex) behaving differently than hitscan Sniper Rifles and only counting bullets that cause damage for combo counting.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Xaku’s Xata’s Whisper sometimers not applying its damage buff or Void Status Effect when using the Komorex.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to equip the Terminal Velocity Mod on the Komorex.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Komorex light FX being too intense.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Komorex’s Energy color persisting as default.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25
patchlogs.fixes: Acquire this new Resource throughout the reworked Jupiter Gas City for crafting related items such as Wisp, Komorex, and more.
